focused_output: The artifact explicitly characterizes the rationale's claim as a "universal total order," establishing c1 as a description of the rationale.
The proposed chain is not justified as universally valid: scope, history model, failure model, and client assumptions are omitted or null.

The labels combine guarantees that can constrain different dimensions, so their ordering depends on precise definitions and assumptions; in particular, PRAM ordering does not by itself establish eventual delivery or convergence.
The rationale must replace the single universal chain with explicitly defined models and conditional implication or incomparability relationships.
